productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Pink & Black Printed Dress
description: Style Note This pink and black dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this cute dress. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details Pink and grey printed dress with a one sided strap, ruched on the chest, an empire waist with a broad band, inner lining and pleated from the waist down Material and Care 100% polyester Gentle machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
